title: Google Already Proved This AI Fear False So I Keep Loading Up
excerpt: The bear case against Alphabet was everywhere two years ago, and the numbers that just printed should have buried it for good. So why does the market keep tr...
content_html:
Quick Read

  • GOOGL Search revenue grew 19% to $60B in Q1 2026, proving AI chatbots enhanced rather than cannibalized Google's core business.

  • Google Cloud grew 63% with a $460B backlog and GenAI revenue up 800%, validating the company's massive infrastructure spending.

  • Alphabet combines Search dominance, hyperscale cloud growth, and YouTube's $9.9B quarterly ad revenue at just 25 times forward earnings.

  • Act now: the analyst who called NVIDIA in 2010 just named his top 10 AI stocks — and Google didn't make the cut. Grab the names FREE today.

I keep hitting the buy button on Alphabet (NASDAQ:GOOGL), and the reason is uncomplicated: the loudest bear case against this stock has already collapsed under its own weight, and I do not think the tape has fully absorbed that yet.

Two years back the consensus fear was that ChatGPT and its imitators would gut Google Search. My conviction rests on what actually printed. In the Q1 2026 report, Search & other revenue landed at $60.399 billion, growing 19% year over year, with Sundar Pichai flagging "queries at an all time high". AI experiences pulled users deeper into Search. That is the whole ballgame for me.

Three Receipts I Keep Coming Back To

First, Search is compounding on the very technology that was supposed to kill it. Pichai told analysts that "since upgrading AI overviews and AI Mode to Gemini 3, we've reduced the cost of core AI responses by more than 30%". Query volume up, unit costs down. That is the signature of a durable business.

Second, Google Cloud is behaving like a rocket with a receipt. Cloud revenue hit $20.028 billion, up 63%, with backlog nearly doubling sequentially to over $460 billion. Cloud operating income tripled to $6.6 billion, and Cloud operating margin climbed to 32.9% (up from 17.8% in Q1 2025). CFO Anat Ashkenazi added that "revenue from products built on our GenAI models grew nearly 800% year-over-year".

Act now: the analyst who called NVIDIA in 2010 just named his top 10 AI stocks — and Google didn't make the cut. Grab the names FREE today.

Third, the machine is throwing off cash and returning it. FY2025 revenue crossed $402.84B for the first time, EPS came in at $10.81, and management raised the dividend 5% to $0.22 per share. Consolidated operating margin sits at 36.1% with return on equity at 38.9%.

Why Not Microsoft or Meta

The reflex alternatives are Microsoft for AI cloud and Meta for digital advertising. My money keeps landing on Alphabet because I can point to the exact number that decides it. Alphabet trades at a forward P/E of 25 while its cloud arm grew 63%, its ad-supported search grew 19%, and consolidated revenue grew 21.8%. Meta does not run a hyperscale cloud. Microsoft does not own a Search franchise or YouTube, where ads clocked $9.883 billion in the quarter. Alphabet is the only name on my screen combining that consumer moat with that enterprise growth at that multiple.

blocks.html_en: Why Not Microsoft or Meta

sentences.en: Why Not Microsoft or Meta
sentences.zh: 为什么不是微软或 Meta

blocks.html_en: The reflex alternatives are Microsoft for AI cloud and Meta for digital advertising. My money keeps landing on Alphabet because I can point to the exact number that decides it. Alphabet trades at a forward P/E of 25 while its cloud arm grew 63%, its ad-supported search grew 19%, and consolidated revenue grew 21.8%. Meta does not run a hyperscale cloud. Microsoft does not own a Search franchise or YouTube, where ads clocked $9.883 billion in the quarter. Alphabet is the only name on my screen combining that consumer moat with that enterprise growth at that multiple.

sentences.en: The reflex alternatives are Microsoft for AI cloud and Meta for digital advertising.
sentences.zh: 反射性的替代品是用于人工智能云的微软和用于数字广告的Meta。

sentences.en: My money keeps landing on Alphabet because I can point to the exact number that decides it.
sentences.zh: 我的钱不断落在 Alphabet 上，因为我可以指出决定它的确切数字。

sentences.en: Alphabet trades at a forward P/E of 25 while its cloud arm grew 63%, its ad-supported search grew 19%, and consolidated revenue grew 21.8%.
sentences.zh: Alphabet 的预期市盈率为 25 倍，而其云部门增长了 63%，广告支持的搜索增长了 19%，综合收入增长了 21.8%。

sentences.en: Meta does not run a hyperscale cloud.
sentences.zh: Meta 不运行超大规模云。

sentences.en: Microsoft does not own a Search franchise or YouTube, where ads clocked $9.883 billion in the quarter.
sentences.zh: 微软不拥有搜索特许经营权或 YouTube，该季度的广告收入为 98.83 亿美元。

sentences.en: Alphabet is the only name on my screen combining that consumer moat with that enterprise growth at that multiple.
sentences.zh: Alphabet 是我屏幕上唯一将消费者护城河与企业增长倍数结合起来的名字。

content_html_zh:
快速阅读

  • 2026 年第一季度，GOOGL 搜索收入增长了 19%，达到 60B 美元，证明人工智能聊天机器人增强了而不是蚕食了 Google 的核心业务。
  • Google Cloud 增长了 63%，积压金额达到 460B 美元，GenAI 收入增长了 800%，证实了该公司庞大的基础设施支出。
  • Alphabet 结合了搜索主导地位、超大规模云增长和 YouTube 9.9B 美元的季度广告收入，而预期收益仅为 25 倍。
  • 立即行动：2010 年给 NVIDIA 打电话的分析师刚刚列出了他心目中的十大人工智能股票，而谷歌却没有上榜。 今天免费获取名字。

我不断地按下 Alphabet（纳斯达克股票代码：GOOGL）的买入按钮，原因并不复杂：针对这只股票的最响亮的空头理由已经在其自身的重量下崩溃了，而且我认为大盘还没有完全吸收这一点。

两年前，人们普遍担心 ChatGPT 及其模仿者会破坏 Google 搜索。 我的信念取决于实际印刷的内容。 在 2026 年第一季度报告中，搜索及其他收入达到 603.99 亿美元，同比增长 19%，Sundar Pichai 表示“查询量达到历史最高水平”。 人工智能体验让用户更深入地进行搜索。 这对我来说就是全部。

我不断回顾的三张收据

首先，搜索正在复合原本应该杀死它的技术。 Pichai 告诉分析师，“自从将 AI 概述和 AI 模式升级到 Gemini 3 以来，我们已经将核心 AI 响应的成本降低了 30% 以上”。 查询量上升，单位成本下降。 这是持久企业的标志。

其次，谷歌云的表现就像一枚有收据的火箭。 云收入达到 200.28 亿美元，增长 63%，积压订单几乎翻了一番，达到超过 4600 亿美元。 云运营收入增长两倍，达到 66 亿美元，云运营利润率攀升至 32.9%（高于 2025 年第一季度的 17.8%）。 首席财务官 Anat Ashkenazi 补充道，“基于我们 GenAI 模型构建的产品的收入同比增长近 800%”。

立即行动：2010 年给 NVIDIA 打电话的分析师刚刚列出了他心目中的十大人工智能股票，而谷歌却没有上榜。 今天免费获取名字。

第三，机器正在扔掉现金并将其返还。 2025 财年收入首次突破 $402.84B，每股收益为 $10.81，管理层将股息提高 5% 至每股 0.22 美元。 综合营业利润率为 36.1%，股本回报率为 38.9%。

为什么不是微软或 Meta

反射性的替代品是用于人工智能云的微软和用于数字广告的Meta。 我的钱不断落在 Alphabet 上，因为我可以指出决定它的确切数字。 Alphabet 的预期市盈率为 25 倍，而其云部门增长了 63%，广告支持的搜索增长了 19%，综合收入增长了 21.8%。 Meta 不运行超大规模云。 微软不拥有搜索特许经营权或 YouTube，该季度的广告收入为 98.83 亿美元。 Alphabet 是我屏幕上唯一将消费者护城河与企业增长倍数结合起来的名字。
